svg.title: API Gateway Request Flow Pipeline
svg.desc: Complete request processing pipeline through API Gateway showing each stage: Parse, Route, Auth, Rate Limit, Transform, Forward, Aggregate, Return with observability and failure handling at each stage
svg.text: Request Processing Stages with Observability and Failure Handling
• Error rates by status code class (4xx, 5xx)
• JSON log entries at each pipeline stage
• Error budget burn rate alerts (14d window)
• Timeouts: Per-stage deadline (e.g., 2s auth, 5s upstream) prevents cascading delays |
• Retries: Exponential backoff with jitter for transient failures, max 3 attempts, idempotent only |
• Circuit Breakers: Open at 50% error rate over 10s window, half-open after 30s to test recovery |
• Fallbacks: Cached responses, default values, or graceful degradation when upstream is unavailable
